mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csv_enter_logs (model_log_id, csv_enter_logs, csv_enter_number, csv_enter_success_number, csv_enter_logs_time, csv_enter_user_id, csv_enter_state, csv_address, run_state) VALUES (#{modelLogId}, #{csvEnterLogs}, #{csvEnterNumber}, #{csvEnterSuccessNumber}, #{csvEnterLogsTime}, #{csvEnterUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM csv_enter_logs WHERE deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0 ORDER BY csv_enter_logs_time DESC
SELECT * FROM csv_enter_logs WHERE deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0 ORDER BY csv_enter_logs_time DESC
